summary: Completed frontend testing for Iteration 39 - Language-by-Country auto-selection, Complete the Look AI section, and Store Onboarding flow. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: StoreOnboarding.jsx: Language-by-Country auto-selection implemented correctly at lines 163-170. When Middle Eastern countries (SA, AE, KW, QA, BH, OM) are selected, language auto-switches to Arabic
CompleteTheLook.jsx: Well-implemented AI-suggested outfit component with selectable items, total price calculation, and 'Add X Items' button
TNVProductDetail.jsx: Properly integrates CompleteTheLook component at lines 349-357, passing currentProduct and relatedProducts
TNVHomePage.jsx: Full-featured homepage with Stories, Flash Sale countdown, Hero carousel, Quick View modal, and infinite scroll products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39 tested Language-by-Country feature, Complete the Look section, and Store Onboarding. All 5 onboarding steps work correctly with RTL support for Arabic. Complete the Look shows AI-suggested products with selectable items and Add Items button. Product ID 2174077403190 (ARVO Aero 15) is a valid test product.
